title: Support passing dynamic array as an argument to DPI

features.name: DPI import function with byte dynamic array inout parameter
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import function declaration with an inout byte unsigned dynamic array parameter
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" function void func_name(int unsigned num_bytes, longint unsigned src, inout byte unsigned dst_sv_array[]);

features.name: DPI import function with int dynamic array inout parameter
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import function declaration with an inout int unsigned dynamic array parameter
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" function void func_name(int unsigned num_bytes, longint unsigned src, inout int unsigned dst_sv_array[]);

features.name: dynamic array as DPI open array argument
features.description: Code should include passing a dynamic array as an actual argument to a DPI open array parameter
